description_long: This rifle features a classic design with a long, dark metallic barrel and receiver, complemented by a wooden fixed stock and foregrip. The receiver is boxy and robust, with a detachable box magazine inserted just ahead of the trigger guard. The rifle is equipped with iron sights mounted along the top, and a distinctive, colorful pinwheel-like object is attached to the muzzle, adding a whimsical touch. The grip is ergonomic and made of black polymer, while the wooden stock and foregrip display a rich brown finish with visible grain. The overall construction suggests a blend of steel, wood, and polymer, typical of mid-20th-century battle rifles.
description: A classic rifle with a wooden stock, black metal receiver, detachable box magazine, and a colorful pinwheel at the muzzle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle with a colorful pinwheel attachment and the narrow profile of the barrel.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the rifle, wooden stock, iron sights, and the pinwheel at the muzzle.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the wooden stock, grip, and the pinwheel at the far end of the barrel.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the rifle's details, including the magazine, trigger, and the pinwheel at the muzzle.
